Name: 64-bit only at the moment. Thank you for understanding.
Description: This app store currently supports only 64-bit Windows applications.

Name: Visual Studio 2022 Community
Description: Microsoft's free IDE for building C#, C++, and .NET applications. Includes debugging, UI designers, and package tools.

Name: Notepad++
Description: Lightweight code and text editor with syntax highlighting, plugins, and multi-tab editing.

Name: Inno Setup
Description: Script-driven installer creator used to build Windows setup executables.

Name: Google Chrome
Description: Popular Chromium-based web browser with fast performance and extension support.

Name: 7Zip
Description: Open source file archiver with high compression ratios and support for many formats.

Name: WinRAR
Description: File compression and archive manager supporting RAR, ZIP, and many other formats.

Name: Windows XP Keygen. This is not a ransomware, Windows Defender is lying.
Description: Utility that generates valid product keys for Windows XP installations.

Name: EaseUS Partition Manager
Description: Disk partition management tool for resizing, creating, deleting, and cloning partitions.

Name: Nullsoft Scriptable Install System
Description: Open source system used to create professional Windows installers using scripts.

Name: .NET Runtime 8.0
Description: Runtime required to run applications built with the .NET 8 framework.

Name: Steam
Description: Valve's gaming platform for purchasing, downloading, and launching PC games.
